data.title: French authorities charge 88, including minors, in crackdown on crypto 'wrench attack', with 135 incidents since 2023.
data.description: Since the year 2023, France has experienced 135 incidents related to cryptocurrency, coinciding with a significant increase in "wrench attacks" across the country.

data.title: ADAMA Introduces Its First Pyrasulfotole-Based Product with the Launch of Marathon® in Australia
data.description: Announced today in Beijing and Tel Aviv, ADAMA Ltd. (SZSE: 000553), a top global crop protection company, has introduced Marathon®, its pioneering weed control and formulation innovation for cereal growers in Australia. This launch signifies a major advancement in crop protection technology within the industry.

data.title: Invitation to presentation of the interim report January-March 2026 for Truecaller AB (publ)
data.description: On April 27, 2026, the prominent communication platform Truecaller announced their upcoming release of the interim report for January-March 2026. The report is set to be published on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 07:30 Central European Time. During this presentation, CEO Rishit Jhunjhunwala and CFO Odd Bolin will lead a discussion on the financial performance of the company during this period. Truecaller, known for its emphasis on safe and reliable communication globally, continues to be a key player in the industry. Stay tuned for further insights into the company's operations and financial standings.

data.title: Alterity Therapeutics Receives Positive FDA Feedback Following Second Type C Meeting on ATH434 Phase 3 Program in Multiple System Atrophy
data.description: Alterity Therapeutics, a biotechnology company listed on ASX and NASDAQ under the symbols ATH and ATHE, respectively, revealed that it had a productive Type C Meeting with the U.S. FDA about the Phase 3 development program for ATH434 in Multiple System Atrophy (MSA). This rare, swiftly advancing neurodegenerative disorder currently lacks any authorized disease-altering remedies. The company's announcement came on April 27, 2026, from Melbourne, Australia, and San Francisco. This development marks a significant step forward in finding solutions for MSA, offering hope to many impacted by the condition.

data.title: How A Small Biotech Name Just Rattled AbbVie's $18 Billion Franchise
data.description: About 66% of individuals who were administered Oruka Therapeutics' new psoriasis medication achieved complete clear skin within a 16-week period. The development has had a significant impact on AbbVie's $18 billion franchise, causing a stir in the biotech industry.

data.title: Sagimet Biosciences Announces Pricing of $175.0 Million Underwritten Offering of Series A Common Stock
data.description: On April 27, 2026, Sagimet Biosciences Inc. disclosed the pricing of an underwritten offering involving 29,166,700 shares of its Series A common stock at $6.00 per share. The gross earnings from this operation are forecasted to reach about $175.0 million, exclusive of underwriting discounts, commissions, and additional offering fees. Every share in this offering is set to be vended by Sagimet. The finalization of the offering is anticipated around April 28, 2026, conditional on meeting regular closing prerequisites.

data.title: The EXCEL - First-of-its-kind study highlights critical role of essential phospholipids in improving Fatty Liver Disease
data.description: A recent study conducted in Paris revealed that the use of essential phospholipids (Essentiale) led to a notable 2.5-fold decrease in liver fat among patients with Metabolic Syndrome. Additionally, participants noted a substantial enhancement in energy levels and better management of blood sugar levels. These findings point to the potential benefits of essential phospholipids in addressing liver health and metabolic issues in affected individuals.

data.title: KUMHO TIRE U.S.A. APPOINTS CAROLINA WAGNER VICE PRESIDENT OF MARKETING
data.description: Carolina Wagner has been appointed as the Vice President of Kumho Tire U.S.A., a prominent tire manufacturer, bringing with her over 25 years of experience and a successful history in respected tire companies. This announcement was made in Atlanta on April 27, 2026.

data.title: One Capsule, Endless Glow--Radiant Skin Starts Within
data.description: USANA Health Sciences, a leading global provider of cellular nutrition, has recently unveiled their newest product, Glow™, marking their debut in the skincare supplement market. This groundbreaking skin supplement aims to promote radiant and even-toned skin. The launch was formally announced on April 27, 2026, in Salt Lake City. USANA Health Sciences, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol USNA, is known for their innovative products targeted at improving overall health and well-being. This venture into skincare with Glow™ is a significant move for the company.

data.title: Allot to Release First Quarter 2026 Results and Host Conference Call on May 12, 2026
data.description: Hod Hasharon, Israel, April 27, 2026 - Allot Ltd., a prominent provider of Security-as-a-Service and network intelligence solutions for communications service providers and enterprises, revealed plans to conduct a conference call on May 12, 2026. The call will focus on discussing the company's first quarter 2026 performance. Scheduled for 8:00AM ET, the call will accommodate stakeholders from various regions, including the UK at 1:00PM and Israel at 3:00PM. Allot Ltd. is listed on the NASDAQ as ALLT and on the TASE as ALLT.

data.title: RED BULL REVEALS THE NEW RED BULL® SUMMER EDITION: SUDACHI LIME
data.description: In Santa Monica, California, on April 27, 2026, Red Bull unveiled the latest Red Bull Summer Edition Sudachi Lime. This seasonal drink is currently up for grabs with or without sugar at various stores across the country, while stocks endure. Highlighted by a refreshing burst of flavors, this special edition is set to captivate consumers for a limited time.

data.title: Payday Is More Than a Paycheck: New Survey Reveals How American Families Celebrate Payday
data.description: A recent study conducted on 3,011 households in the United States revealed that the modern payday experience is characterized by shared meals, relief, and reconnection. The research, conducted in Greenville, S.C. on April 27, 2026, identified that payday holds significant emotional significance for many American families beyond its financial implications. This survey sheds light on the fact that for millions, payday serves as a moment for connecting and finding solace.

data.title: Galaxy Therapeutics Submits Final Module of PMA to U.S. FDA for SEAL™ Device in Wide-Neck Bifurcation Aneurysms
data.description: In Milpitas, California on April 27, 2026, Galaxy Therapeutics, a clinical-stage medical device company specializing in brain aneurysm treatment, revealed the completion of the final module of its Pre-Market Approval (PMA) application to the U.S. FDA. This significant step marks a crucial milestone in the firm's progress towards gaining regulatory approval for its innovative medical device.
